name: Kali Linux (noVNC 手動版)
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y kali-linux-headless xfce4 xfce4-goodies x11vnc xvfb novnc && mkdir -p ~/.vnc && x11vnc -storepasswd kali ~/.vnc/passwd && sed -i 's/set_port 6080/set_port 6080/' /usr/share/novnc/utils/novnc_proxy
postStartCommand: export DISPLAY=:1 && Xvfb :1 -screen 0 1280x1024x24 & sleep 2 && startxfce4 & sleep 2 && x11vnc -rfbauth ~/.vnc/passwd -display :1 -forever -shared & sleep 2 && /usr/share/novnc/utils/novnc_proxy --vnc localhost:5900 --listen 6080 &
